research_question: What are the longitudinal PTSD symptom trajectories following trauma exposure, as reported in prospective studies?

population.name: Population
include: individuals exposed to a traumatic event (any type)
exclude: general population without specified trauma exposure
children (<12 years) only without adult data

exposure.name: Exposure
include: trauma exposure (combat, disaster, accident, assault, abuse)
exclude: subclinical stressful life events not meeting trauma criteria

outcome.name: Outcome
include: PTSD symptom severity assessed at ≥3 time points
trajectory group membership (resilient, recovery, chronic, delayed onset)
PTSD diagnosis using DSM or ICD criteria
exclude: general anxiety or depression without PTSD-specific measures
